title: Epigram. On Reading Grim's Attack Upon Clinton.
content:
'Tis the opinion of the town
        That Grim's a silly elf:
    In trying to write Clinton down,
        He went RIGHT DOWN HIMSELF.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, George Pope Morris delivers a powerful performance in "Epigram. On Reading Grim's Attack Upon Clinton."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
